params.name: Von Neumann Arch.
params.description:
On Apr 29, 1945 AD, Von Neumann finished a draft plan for the new computer and began working on its production.
The computer was designed based on Von Neumann's architecture. During his work on the world's first computer, Von Neumann identified several flaws in its design. Through extensive and revolutionary research, he developed the theory of using binary algorithms and memory, as well as the fundamental structure of the computer, which includes five main components: the processing unit, co …
